授業目的: This class will study and examine American society from the view point of memories and their cultures.
到達目標: Students will obtain the ability to get multiple perspective to see US society.

第2回:
【Core Weeks①】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Native American its history and culture
第3回:
【Core Weeks②】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Native Hawaiian its history culture
第4回:
【Core Weeks③】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Chicano American its history and culture
第5回:
【Core Weeks④】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Chinese American its history and culture
第6回:
【Core Weeks⑤】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Japanese American its history and culture
第7回:
【Core Weeks⑥】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Korean  American its history and culture
